# `input.string`

> **Stability:** stable
> **Since:** 0.4

Build a string input descriptor.

## Signature

```ts
string(defaultValue: string, opts?: {
    readonly title?: string;
    readonly multiline?: boolean;
}): StringDescriptor {
    return Object.freeze({ kind: "string" as const, defaultValue, ...opts });
}
```

## Example

```ts
const symbol = input.string("AAPL");
    void symbol;
```
